records.question: In which mountain range does Mount Everest lie?
records.answer_a: The Mahalangur Himal sub-range of the Himalayas.
records.answer_sf_true: Mount Everest is located in the Mahalangur Himal sub-range of the Himalayan mountain range.

records.question: Who was the first to reach the summit of Mount Everest, in 1953?
records.answer_a: Edmund Hillary of New Zealand and Tenzing Norgay, a Sherpa of Nepal, were the first to reach the summit of Mount Everest on May 29, 1953.
records.answer_sf_true: The first people to reach the summit of Mount Everest were Sir Edmund Hillary from New Zealand and Tenzing Norgay, a Nepali Sherpa mountaineer. They achieved this historic feat on May 29, 1953.

records.question: Who accompanied Edmund Hillary on the first ascent of Mount Everest?
records.answer_a: Tenzing Norgay, a Sherpa of Nepal, accompanied Edmund Hillary on the first ascent of Mount Everest.

records.question: After whom was Mount Everest named?
records.answer_a: The mountain was named after Sir George Everest, a former Surveyor General of India.
records.answer_sf_true: Mount Everest was named after Sir George Everest, a British surveyor-general of India.

records.question: What is Mount Everest called in Tibetan?
records.answer_sf_true: Mount Everest is called "Chomolungma" in Tibetan.
